title: Cyberpunk Esports Action Poster AI
sourceTitle: Cyberpunk Esports Action Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cyberpunk esports action poster featuring future armored esports warrior in rainy vertical neon city arena, with headline 真正的胜利，来自最后一秒。 and title FINAL ROUND. Subject: future armored esports warrior stands as the central competitive warrior, surrounded by blue-purple electricity, technology particles, neon city energy, speed trails, and high-stakes final-round tension. Scene: Futuristic esports arena or cyberpunk city battle environment from rainy vertical neon city arena, with neon architecture, digital particles, electric arcs, holographic UI accents, and dramatic competitive atmosphere. Composition: Fixed 4:5 esports poster layout: central hero figure, large title zone above, dynamic diagonal energy lines, strong foreground-midground depth, particle burst around the body, and clear bottom or secondary text hierarchy. Signature Elements: future armored esports warrior, rainy vertical neon city arena, blue-purple electric arcs, technology particles, neon city, dynamic diagonal composition, high-impact typography, 真正的胜利，来自最后一秒。, and FINAL ROUND. Style: Esports poster design, cyberpunk gaming aesthetic, futuristic action visual, high-impact typography, competitive brand advertising energy, and ultra-sharp 8K game-poster finish. Color Palette: Neon blue, electric purple, deep black, high-contrast tech cyan, small magenta highlights, and bright white energy particles. Lighting: Hard neon rim light, electric blue-purple glow, high-contrast city reflections, particle bloom, and speed-light streaks around the hero silhouette. Camera: Low heroic poster camera with dynamic diagonal framing, central full-body or three-quarter hero view, and strong esports key-art impact. Typography: 真正的胜利，来自最后一秒。 appears as the readable Chinese competitive slogan; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
